{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "15. Un tas ta buhs/ ka teem
ps Walta dohta/ ta winnar-
dsan darrihs: Ta taps tee tew
dohti par Samattaſchann tai
ſcha Deena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Tapehz kad es tawa Kal-
one to wiſſu famanntijn / etmu
no wiſſkeem behgufi / un
eews irr man fuhtijs tahdas
etas darriht / pahr to istrub-
nasees wiſſa Semme/ zik tahs
ſchas dsirdehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "17. Jo tawa Kalpone irr Dee-
abihſtga / un kalpo tam Dee-
am no Debbes Deena un Nak-
: Nu tad/ mans Kungs/ lai ee
e tewis paleeku/ tad isees ta-
a Kalpone tk Nakts tai Eelei-
/ un es peeluhſchu Deewu/
tas man Sinnu dohs / kad
e sawus Greckus padarriſtchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "18. - Tad nahſchu es / un
triſchu tew finnamu: Tad
arreſt tu ar wiſſu tawu Kaſ-
Spehku iſeet/ un ne kas
tahs/ kas tew pretti turretceſ no
inneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. Un es weddichu tew zaur
nduSemmes widdu/ kamehr
nahkti prett Jeruſalemi / un
likſchn tawn Gehdekti win-
as Widdit/ ka tu tohs tapatt
feun ta Awis/ kam Ganna ne-
atd/ un nekahde Suns drihk
ehs tawu. Mehlt prett tewi ku-
eht/ jo tas irr man ta runnahts
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Schee winnas Wahrdt
patikke Dlowernum un wiſſeem
winna Sullafteem/ un tee brih-
nijahs pahr winnas Gudribu /
un fazztia:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. No weena Semmes Gal-
la lihds ohtram ne irr tahda Gee-
wa no Skaistuma un Sapra-
ſchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "22. Un Dlowernuß fazzija us
to : Deewg irr labbi darrijs / ka
wiſſch tewi ſcheem Laudim pa-
vreekſch irr fuhtijs/ ka muhfahm
Rohkahm Warra/ un teen/ kas
mannu Kungu nizzinaſcht Pa-
sſchana nahkahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "23. Un nu tew irr ſkaifts Gihr-
mis un mihtiga Walloa: Ja tu
ta darriſi / ka tu eſti runnajſi/
tad taws Deewg buhs arridsan
mans Deewg/ un tu fehdeseeltſch
ta Rehnina Nebukadnezara
Namma/ un buhſi flaweta zaux
wiſſu Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XII. Nodalla.
1. Ad pawehleja wiſsch to
Eeerwest tai Weeta/ fur
winna Sudraba Riht
bija/ un likke winnat no fawas
Barribas ehſt/ un no tawa Wiht-
na Dsert doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Bet Juhdite fazzija: Es
ne ehdiſchu no tahs/ ka tas man
var Avgrehzibu ne tohp / bet no
ta/ kas ar mannim atnesis irr/
liſſchohs es few taifitees.
"
    }
